message:
fix(api): propagate context into feedback GitHub API helpers (#9905)

* fix(api): propagate context into feedback GitHub API helpers and add goroutine timeouts

Thread context.Context through closeGitHubIssue, addIssueComment,
addPRComment, verifyGitHubIssueOwnership, fetchPRPages, and
fetchGitHubIssuesFromRepo so client disconnects cancel in-flight
GitHub API calls. Wrap fire-and-forget goroutines with a 30s timeout
context to prevent goroutine leaks when GitHub is slow or
unresponsive.

Also extract magic queue depth thresholds in the Jaeger card to named
constants (QUEUE_DEPTH_WARNING_THRESHOLD, QUEUE_DEPTH_ALERT_THRESHOLD).

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: propagate context in auth GitHub helpers and guard flatcar isDemoFallback

Thread context.Context through getGitHubUser and getGitHubPrimaryEmail
in auth.go so client disconnects cancel in-flight GitHub API requests.

Fix flatcar_status isDemoFallback guard to include !isLoading check,
matching the established pattern in contour, cubefs, and harbor cards.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
